reason: PRD with all requirements, decisions, acceptance criteria for both PR1 and PR2
Frontend state management guidelines - must align reducer pattern with project conventions
Hook design guidelines - useTaskEvents and new hooks must follow these patterns
Component structure guidelines - ChatLog/SubtaskTree/StatusBar refactors must comply
TUI gRPC integration spec - pauseTask/resumeTask/streaming behavior reference
Type safety guidelines - TuiState, actions, reducer types must be strictly typed
Quality bar - typecheck/build must pass, testing expectations
